pi_items.source: PHP DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers() contains Europe/London as a valid IANA timezone identifier. Verified via PHP documentation and Emoncms source code which uses PHP's timezone system.
Email format is valid according to RFC 5322 specification. The format user@domain.co.uk is a standard, valid email address format. Emoncms accepts email addresses in this format.

Confirmed in setup_emoncms.sh (line 146): admin user is created with username='admin'. Verified in setup_task.sh (line 30) and export_result.sh (line 15-16) which query the 'admin' user from the database.

privileged_info_summary: The task updates an Emoncms admin account with verified metadata values. The expected timezone 'Europe/London' is a valid IANA timezone identifier supported by PHP's DateTimeZone system used by Emoncms. The expected email 'admin@greenbuilding.co.uk' is a valid RFC 5322 compliant email address. The target user 'admin' is confirmed as the username of the account being modified. The task involves updating the account from initial state (UTC timezone, admin@emoncms.local email) to the specified expected values via the Emoncms web interface.
